name: Qwen2.5 1.5B Instruct
notes: Very light general assistant for constrained devices.

name: Qwen2.5 3B Instruct
notes: Strong small model with better reasoning than 1.5B.

name: Qwen2.5 7B Instruct
notes: Balanced option for everyday coding and chat.

name: Qwen2.5 14B Instruct
notes: High quality if RAM allows.

name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
notes: Fast assistant with broad ecosystem support.

name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct
notes: Reliable default for local assistants.

name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct (Q5)
notes: Higher fidelity at modest speed cost.

name: Llama 3.1 70B Instruct
notes: Top quality but very hardware heavy.

name: Mistral 7B Instruct
notes: Good all-around quality in a mid-size footprint.

name: Mixtral 8x7B Instruct
notes: MoE quality boost with large memory demand.

name: Mistral Nemo 12B
notes: Strong multilingual quality at moderate size.

name: Gemma 2 2B Instruct
notes: Small and very responsive for simple tasks.

name: Gemma 2 9B Instruct
notes: High quality on mid-to-high RAM machines.

name: Gemma 2 27B Instruct
notes: Excellent output quality with high memory cost.

name: Phi-3 Mini 3.8B
notes: Fast and surprisingly capable coding assistant.

name: Phi-3 Medium 14B
notes: Very strong coding quality on capable systems.

name: Phi-4 14B
notes: High reasoning quality with slower throughput.

name: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B
notes: Code-focused balance of speed and quality.

name: Qwen2.5 Coder 14B
notes: Great code generation for higher-memory machines.

name: Llama 3.2 1B Instruct
notes: Ultra-fast baseline model for lightweight tasks.

name: Mistral Small 22B
notes: Strong quality for advanced local use.

name: Kimi K2 Instruct
notes: 1T parameter MoE model (32B active). Cloud/API only — requires ~560GB RAM at Q4, not feasible locally even on Mac Studio M4 Ultra 512GB.

name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
notes: Cloud/API only model family, not runnable locally via Ollama.

name: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
notes: Cloud/API only model family, not runnable locally via Ollama.

name: Claude 3 Opus
notes: Cloud/API only Opus family model; not runnable locally via Ollama.

name: Claude 4 Opus
notes: Cloud/API only Opus family model; not runnable locally via Ollama.

name: Qwen2.5 0.5B Instruct
notes: Ultra-lightweight model used in Keiro, ideal for mobile devices.

name: Gemma 3 1B Instruct
notes: Latest Gemma generation with improved efficiency for mobile use.

name: Phi-4 Mini 3.8B
notes: Latest Phi-4 mini variant with enhanced reasoning capabilities.

name: SmolLM2 360M
notes: Extremely lightweight model for embedded devices and IoT.

name: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct
notes: Latest Llama 3.3 with improved reasoning and coding capabilities.

name: Llama 3.1 405B Instruct
notes: Requires 256GB+ RAM. Best for Mac Studio M4 Ultra and Mac Pro with large memory.

name: DeepSeek-R1 671B
notes: Requires 400GB+ RAM. Runs on Mac Studio M4 Ultra 512GB only.

name: Qwen3 8B
notes: Latest Qwen3 generation with enhanced reasoning.

name: Qwen3 14B
notes: Mid-range Qwen3 with excellent coding performance.

name: Qwen3 30B
notes: Large Qwen3 variant for high-quality outputs.

name: Gemma 3 4B Instruct
notes: Latest Gemma3 with improved reasoning and efficiency.

name: Gemma 3 12B Instruct
notes: Mid-range Gemma3 with balanced performance.

name: Gemma 3 27B Instruct
notes: Large Gemma3 variant with excellent output quality.

name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 7B
notes: Distilled DeepSeek-R1 reasoning model based on Qwen.

name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 14B
notes: Larger distilled DeepSeek-R1 with enhanced reasoning capabilities.

name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Llama 70B
notes: Large distilled DeepSeek-R1 for maximum reasoning quality.

name: GPT-4o
notes: Cloud/API only GPT-4 Omni model with multimodal capabilities.

name: GPT-4o mini
notes: Cloud/API only compact version of GPT-4o with faster responses.

name: Claude 4 Sonnet
notes: Cloud/API only Claude 4 Sonnet with enhanced reasoning capabilities.

name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
notes: Cloud/API only Gemini 2.5 Pro with advanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities.

name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
notes: Cloud/API only Gemini 2.5 Flash optimized for speed and efficiency.

name: DeepSeek-V3
notes: Cloud/API only DeepSeek-V3 mixture of experts model with exceptional coding capabilities.

name: GLM-5
notes: Cloud/API only GLM-5 — Zhipu AI's latest reasoning model with MoE architecture.

name: GLM-4 Plus
notes: Cloud/API only GLM-4 Plus — Zhipu AI's high-performance general purpose model.

name: Qwen3 235B A22B
notes: Massive MoE model with 22B active parameters. Requires 192GB+ RAM.

name: Mistral Small 3.1
notes: Mistral Small 3.1 — latest iteration with improved efficiency. Runs locally on 24GB+ RAM.

name: DeepSeek-V3-0324
notes: Cloud/API only DeepSeek-V3-0324 — March 2025 update with enhanced reasoning capabilities.

name: DeepSeek-R1
notes: Cloud/API only full DeepSeek-R1 671B MoE with advanced reasoning capabilities.

name: Qwen3.5 0.8B Instruct
notes: Ultra-light Qwen3.5 with native multimodal. 262K context. Ideal for mobile and IoT edge devices.

name: Qwen3.5 2B Instruct
notes: Fast small Qwen3.5 with native multimodal and 262K context. Great for edge tasks and quick chat.

name: Qwen3.5 4B Instruct
notes: 88.8 MMLU-Redux beats 20B-class models. Native multimodal, 262K context. Best quality-per-GB ratio in its class.

name: Qwen3.5 9B Instruct
notes: 91.1 MMLU-Redux rivals 30B+ models. Native multimodal, 262K context. Near-frontier quality under 10GB RAM.

name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B Instruct
notes: MoE model (35B total, 3B active). Surpasses Qwen3-235B-A22B. Runs on 24GB Mac/RAM. Better architecture beats bigger parameter counts.

name: Qwen3.5 27B Instruct
notes: Mid-size model narrowing the gap between medium and frontier models. Excellent for complex agent scenarios.

name: Qwen3.5 122B-A10B Instruct
notes: MoE model (122B total, 10B active). Closes the gap between medium-sized and frontier models. Best for complex agent scenarios. Requires high-end Mac Studio.

name: LFM2 24B-A2B Instruct
bestFor: Local AI agents, privacy-first tool calling, MCP workflows
notes: LiquidAI flagship hybrid MoE (24B total, 2B active). Powers LocalCowork open-source agent app with 75 MCP tools. 112 tok/s on AMD CPU, 293 tok/s on H100. Requires 16GB+ unified memory. Best for privacy-sensitive enterprise workflows with zero cloud.

name: LFM2.5 8B-A1B
bestFor: On-device agents, tool calling, multilingual chat
notes: LiquidAI hybrid conv+GQA model (8.3B total, 1.5B active per token). IFEval 91.84, MATH500 88.76 per official HF model card. 128K context, native tool calling, 10 languages. ~5 GB at Q4_K_M — runs on most Apple Silicon Macs. Not its strongest area: heavy coding.

name: Granite 4.1 3B Instruct
notes: IBM dense 3B (June 2026), Apache 2.0. MMLU 67.02 per IBM model card. 131K context, 12 languages. Safe pick for any Apple Silicon Mac, including 8 GB machines.

name: Granite 4.1 8B Instruct
bestFor: Enterprise assistant, tool calling, instruction following
notes: IBM dense 8B (June 2026), Apache 2.0. MMLU 73.84 per IBM model card. 131K context, OpenAI-style tool calling, 12 languages. IBM states it matches the older Granite 4.0-H-Small 32B MoE on enterprise benchmarks.

name: Qwen3.6 27B
notes: Apr 2026 flagship dense Qwen. 262K context, extensible to 1M. SWE-Bench Verified 77.2, MMLU-Pro 86.2. Apache 2.0. Best dense open-source coding model in its class.

name: Qwen3.6 35B-A3B
notes: Apr 2026 MoE (35B total, 3B active). Successor to Qwen3.5-35B-A3B with better reasoning and tool calling. 262K context. Runs at ~55 tok/s on M5 Max via MLX.

name: Gemma 4 31B
notes: Apr 2, 2026 release from Google DeepMind. Dense 31B. MMLU-Pro 85.2, GPQA Diamond 84.3. Apache 2.0. Multimodal text+image.

name: Gemma 4 26B-A4B
notes: Apr 2026 MoE (26B total, 4B active). MMLU-Pro 82.6, GPQA Diamond 82.3. Apache 2.0. Strong throughput on 24GB Mac via MLX.

name: Gemma 4 E4B
notes: Apr 2026 on-device Gemma 4 with Per-Layer Embeddings. 4.5B effective params. Runs on 8GB Macs and high-end iPhones. Apache 2.0.

name: Gemma 4 E2B
notes: Apr 2026 ultra-light Gemma 4. 2.3B effective. ~158 tok/s on M5 Max — fastest in the 2026 batch. iPhone-class device target.

name: Llama 4 Scout
notes: Meta Llama 4 Scout: 109B total, 17B active MoE. 10M context. Multimodal. Best run on Mac Studio 96GB+ or 128GB.

name: Llama 4 Maverick
notes: Meta Llama 4 Maverick: 400B total, 17B active MoE. 1M context. Multimodal. Requires Mac Studio M4 Ultra 256GB+ for local.

name: Mistral Medium 3.5
notes: Apr 30, 2026. 128B dense. SWE-Bench Verified 77.6%. Merges Magistral + Devstral 2 + Pixtral. GGUF available but 96GB+ Mac required.

name: DeepSeek V4 Flash
notes: Apr 24, 2026 open-weight (MIT). 284B total, 13B active MoE. 1M context. Thinking Mode rivals OpenAI o-series on STEM. Local needs 128GB+ Mac via antirez llama.cpp fork.

name: DeepSeek V4 Pro
notes: Apr 24, 2026. 1.6T total, 49B active MoE. MIT license. Not realistically runnable on consumer Mac. API ~$3.48 per 1M output tokens.

name: Kimi K2.6
notes: Apr 20, 2026 Moonshot AI release. 1T total, 32B active MoE. SWE-Bench Pro 58.6%. GGUF available (Unsloth UD-Q4: ~250GB). Open weights, Mac Studio 192-512GB territory.

name: GLM-5.1
notes: Apr 7, 2026 from Z.ai. 744B total, 40B active MoE with DeepSeek Sparse Attention. SWE-Bench Pro 58.4. MIT license. Local GGUF available (200-220GB).

name: Claude Opus 4.7
notes: Apr 16, 2026 Anthropic flagship. SWE-Bench Verified 87.6% — current leader. $5 input / $25 output per 1M tokens. Cloud only.

name: Claude Opus 4.8
notes: Anthropic's current flagship and the most capable model for Claude Code. Best-in-class agentic tool use and long-horizon coding. Parameter count undisclosed (cloud API). Cloud only.

name: GPT-5.5
notes: Apr 23, 2026 OpenAI flagship. Pro and Instant variants follow May 5. Cloud only.

name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
notes: Apr 2026 Google flagship. Strong multimodal, 2M context. Cloud only.

name: Grok 4.3
notes: Apr 17, 2026 xAI flagship. Full rollout May 6. 1M context (Apr 30 expansion). Cloud only.

name: Gemma 4 12B
notes: Jun 3, 2026 Google DeepMind release. Unified encoder-free dense 12B, multimodal (text/image/audio), 256K context. MMLU-Pro 77.2, GPQA Diamond 78.8, LiveCodeBench v6 72.0. Beats Gemma 3 27B and runs comfortably on a 16GB Mac. Open weights.

name: Claude Fable 5
notes: Jun 9, 2026 Anthropic release: the first publicly available Mythos-class model, a tier above Opus 4.8. Anthropic reports it took the open coding lead on their own benchmarks (precise scores not published in primary-source text). Parameter count undisclosed (cloud API). Cloud only.

name: GLM-5.2
notes: Jun 13, 2026 from Z.ai. Coding-first flagship positioned to rival Claude Opus; available via the GLM Coding Plan and API, works with Claude Code, Cline and OpenCode. MIT open weights expected shortly after launch. Reported 1M context (not yet confirmed first-party).

name: Kimi K2.7-Code
notes: Jun 12, 2026 Moonshot AI release. 1T total / 32B active MoE built on K2.6, cutting thinking-token usage ~30%. 256K context, Modified MIT license. Open weights, but 1T scale means cloud/API for nearly all users; Ollama exposes a cloud-only tag.

name: MiniMax M3
notes: Jun 1, 2026 MiniMax release. Native-multimodal MoE (~428B total / ~23B active) with 1M context via MiniMax Sparse Attention. SWE-Bench Pro 59.0%, Terminal-Bench 2.1 66.0%. Open weights; cloud/API for nearly all users.

name: Qwen3.7-Plus
notes: Jun 1, 2026 Alibaba Qwen release. Proprietary multimodal agent model (vision + GUI control + code) on a 1M-token context, via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / Bailian API. API-only, no open weights. Parameter count undisclosed.

name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra
notes: Jun 4, 2026 NVIDIA release. 550B total / 55B active hybrid Mamba-2 + MoE, up to 1M context. SWE-Bench Verified 70.7; Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index 48 (leading US open-weights model). Datacenter-class hardware (8x B200 or 16x H100), so cloud/API for nearly all users; Ollama exposes a cloud-only tag.
